name: linear-opencode-agent
description: Self-hosted Linear agent powered by OpenCode and Cloudflare Workers

scripts.deploy:all: bun run --filter @linear-opencode-agent/linear deploy && bun run --filter @linear-opencode-agent/agent deploy
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check && bun run format:check
scripts.fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run format:fix
